name: Pure group mint: Source→Router→Group→Sink (3 steps)
description: Simplest possible group minting path. Source holds 1 collateral token trusted by group 0x4332. Source and sink both trust the group but have no direct trust. Path: Source→Router→Group(0x4332)→Sink. Exactly 3 transfer steps.
notes: Achieves full 1 CRC target. Minimal 3-step path makes this ideal for edge ordering validation.
